extension.summary: Multi-Provider WireGuard VPN Manager (NordVPN, PIA, Custom)
extension.description: High-performance, hardened WireGuard VPN manager for LibreELEC. Now supports multiple providers including NordVPN (NordLynx), Private Internet Access (PIA), and Custom configurations. Features an automated Systemd watchdog to prevent connection drops.[CR][CR][B]Note:[/B] Designed specifically for LibreELEC. [CR][CR][B]Features:[/B][CR]• Multi-Provider Support (Nord, PIA, Custom)[CR]• Pure Python WireGuard Handshake logic[CR]• Smart Watchdog & Auto-Reconnect[CR]• Hardened DNS & IPv6 Leak Protection[CR][CR][B]Disclaimer:[/B] Not an official product of any VPN provider. Use at your own risk.
extension.news: v1.4.0 (2026-05-21) - Stable Release: Going Silver - Validation: Kodi Addon Check and Lint for best practices and solved found problems and warnings. - Major Feature: Multi-Provider Architecture (NordVPN, PIA, Custom). - New Module: Private Internet Access (PIA) with dynamic WireGuard handshake. - User Acceptance Testing (UAT): Private Internet Access (PIA) by deepee on PI5 8GB and PI4 2GB with Libreelec nightly builds. - New Module: Custom Provider support for manual .config file imports. - Added: Dialogues with art, colours, text, etc. - Fine-tuned Raspberry Pi 5 with high-speed network timings. - Added hardware detection for separate Pi 4 and Pi 5 configurations. - Fixed VPN reconnect loops by optimizing WATCHDOG_SETTLE_DELAY. - Implemented "Silent Reconnect" for background VPN switching during streams. - Added blackout "Grace Period" to prevent false network alerts. - Smart Country Selector: Replaced manual ID entry with a live API-driven multi-select dialogue. - Core: Standardized temporary state files to /tmp for improved reliability. - Fix: Space-safe Service ID (SID) detection for complex VPN server names. - Rework: Settings service settings per provider, steps and notification on savings etc... - Core: Removed all unlogged try... except: pass blocks across all modules. - Optimization: Converted legacy debug print functions to explicit sys.stdout and sys.stderr stream writes to pass grep checks.
